'''The Spiral''' was a cavern section in [[Eskaron]] which at least one race course went through. As it name implied, it was a long spiral-like section of tunnel about forty meters in diameter much of the way. At the end of the spiral, the tunnel unexpectedly turned upward at an angle of close to 90 degrees.

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], [[Blood Raptors]] member [[Gael Kinner]]'s [[G-59 Cannibalizer]] and [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] intimidated entrepreneur [[Teeloo]]'s [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210]] ''[[Neeva-Beelo]]'' raced through Eskaron, passing through this area.
